# SuperSeller AI — Your AI Crew for Business

SuperSeller AI is a credit-based SaaS platform that gives businesses an AI crew of 6 specialized agents — each one replacing an expensive hire or agency.

## The Crew (AI Agents)

- **Forge** (Video Producer): Paste any business URL → AI generates cinematic marketing videos with face compositing, music, and text overlays.
- **Spoke** (AI Avatar Video): Record a voice note and upload a photo → AI generates a lip-synced avatar video of you speaking. Explain policies, announce specials, pitch services — without being on camera.
- **FrontDesk** (AI Receptionist): 24/7 natural voice AI answering, lead capture, appointment booking, urgent call routing.
- **Scout** (Lead Hunter): AI-sourced qualified leads, landing page builder, CRM integration, WhatsApp delivery.
- **Buzz** (Content Creator): AI content creation, approval workflows, 6-platform publishing (FB, IG, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, YouTube).
- **Cortex** (Analyst): Document ingestion (RAG), Q&A from brand materials, team knowledge base, API access.
- **Market** (Marketplace Automation): Auto-generates FB Marketplace listings with AI copy, stealth images, location rotation.

## Pricing (Credit-Based)

- **Starter**: $79/mo — 500 credits, ~5 videos
- **Pro**: $149/mo — 1,500 credits, ~15 videos (Most Popular)
- **Team**: $299/mo — 4,000 credits, ~50 videos

One credit system. All agents. No per-tool subscriptions. Cancel anytime.

## Industries Served

Real estate, HVAC, plumbing, locksmiths, restaurants, auto repair, dental, insurance, contractors, landscaping, pool services, garage doors, solar, moving, and more.
